title: Baseless allegations: SG Tushar Mehta opposes Arvind Kejriwal's recusal plea against Justice Swarana Kanta Sharma
description: The Delhi High Court on Monday asked the Central Bureau of Investigation (CBI) to respond to former Delhi Chief Minister Arvind Kejriwal's plea seeking the judge's recusal in the excise policy case.Justice Swarana Kanta Sharma was hearing CBI's appeal against trial court order discharging Kejriwal and other accused in the case. When the matter was taken up today, Kejriwal appeared in person and told the Court that he has filed an application seeking recusal of Justice Sharma.Solicitor General (S
